channel.title: Signal on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Signal on Tech Tracker

item.title: Signal Messenger - Does it have potential to become alternative to what'sapp!
item.description: ￼ <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-hUwYinC3Z_A/X_5d3epTuLI/AAAAAAAACrg/SybSG3Ogjes3b3HrifuTBVNG0ngfu1UjQCLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1610505683420462-0.png" alt="Signal Messenger - Does it have potential to become alternative to what&rsquo;sapp!" title="Signal Messenger - Does it have potential to become alternative to what'sapp!"> We all know WhatsApp is such an amazing social messaging app which have billions of downloads in playstore which is utilised by company’s, corporates and individuals for various purposes for its simplicity and features which is also first known to give simple user experience with free calls and messaging anywhere in the world.
